leadText: Shelter (Japanese: たてこもる Barricade) is a non-damaging Steel-type move introduced during Generation VIII, in Pokémon Legends: Arceus. It is the signature move of Hisuian Sliggoo and Goodra, and in Pokémon Legends: Arceus, Goomy as well.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Shelter raises the user's defensive stats in addition to making opponents' moves less likely to hit the user. Pokémon Legends: Arceus Category Status PP 10 Agile Strong Power — — — Accuracy —% —% —% Action speed modifier Self -2 -3 +5 Target ? ? ? Additional effect Turns 4 3 5 ? ? ? ? Raises the user's defensive stats Obscures the user Raises the user's action speed Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Shelter raises the user's Defense by two stages.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description LA The user makes its skin as hard as an iron shield, raising its defensive stats. Incoming moves also become more likely to miss. S V The user makes its skin as hard as an iron shield, sharply boosting its Defense stat.
